_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: Rust Generic
author: eggs@pashka.host
description: A generic Rust egg with native Git support. Clones or pulls a repo on every start and builds the project with Cargo in release mode.
startup: if [ "${AUTO_UPDATE}" == "1" ]; then GIT_ADDR="${GIT_ADDRESS}"; if [[ "${GIT_ADDR}" != *.git ]]; then GIT_ADDR="${GIT_ADDR}.git"; fi; USERNAME_NORM="${USERNAME:-git}"; REPO_URL="https://${USERNAME_NORM}:${ACCESS_TOKEN}@${GIT_ADDR}"; BRANCH="${BRANCH:-main}"; if [ ! -d .git ] || [ ! -f .git/config ]; then echo "Cloning repo..."; rm -rf * .git && git clone --branch "$BRANCH" "$REPO_URL" .; else echo "Pulling latest from $BRANCH..."; git fetch origin "$BRANCH" && git reset --hard FETCH_HEAD; fi; fi; if [ ! -z "${PRE_BUILD_CMD}" ]; then echo "Running pre-build command..."; eval "${PRE_BUILD_CMD}"; fi; if [ "${BUILD_MODE}" == "debug" ]; then echo "Building in debug mode..."; cargo build ${BUILD_ARGS}; BINARY=$(cargo metadata --no-deps --format-version 1 | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin)['packages'][0]['targets'][0]['name'])" 2>/dev/null || echo "app"); ./target/debug/$BINARY ${APP_ARGS}; else echo "Building in release mode..."; cargo build --release ${BUILD_ARGS}; BINARY=$(cargo metadata --no-deps --format-version 1 | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin)['packages'][0]['targets'][0]['name'])" 2>/dev/null || echo "app"); ./target/release/$BINARY ${APP_ARGS}; fi

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# Rust Generic — Installation Script
# Support: eggs@pashka.host

apt update -y
apt install -y git curl jq file unzip

mkdir -p /mnt/server
cd /mnt/server

if [ -z "${GIT_ADDRESS}" ]; then
    echo "No git repo set — skipping clone."
    exit 0
fi

if [[ ${GIT_ADDRESS} != *.git ]]; then
    GIT_ADDRESS=${GIT_ADDRESS}.git
fi

USERNAME_NORM="${USERNAME:-git}"

if [ -z "${ACCESS_TOKEN}" ]; then
    echo "Using anonymous clone."
else
    GIT_ADDRESS="https://${USERNAME_NORM}:${ACCESS_TOKEN}@$(echo ${GIT_ADDRESS} | cut -d/ -f3-)"
fi

BRANCH="${BRANCH:-main}"

if [ "$(ls -A /mnt/server)" ]; then
    if [ -d .git ] && [ -f .git/config ]; then
        ORIGIN=$(git config --get remote.origin.url)
        if [ "${ORIGIN}" == "${GIT_ADDRESS}" ]; then
            echo "Pulling latest from ${BRANCH}..."
            git pull origin ${BRANCH}
        else
            echo "Different repo detected — skipping pull."
        fi
    else
        echo "Files found with no git config — skipping to avoid data loss."
        exit 10
    fi
else
    echo "Cloning ${GIT_ADDRESS} (branch: ${BRANCH})..."
    git clone --single-branch --branch ${BRANCH} ${GIT_ADDRESS} .
fi

export HOME=/mnt/server

echo "Building project..."
cargo build --release ${BUILD_ARGS}

echo "Installation complete."
exit 0

variables.name: Git Repository
variables.description: Full HTTPS URL of the Git repository to clone.

variables.name: Branch
variables.description: Branch to clone and pull from on each start.

variables.name: Git Username
variables.description: Username for authenticating with a private repository.

variables.name: Git Access Token
variables.description: Personal access token for authenticating with a private repository.

variables.name: Auto Update
variables.description: Pulls the latest changes from the repository on every startup.

variables.name: Build Mode
variables.description: Cargo build profile to use. Set to debug for faster builds or release for optimized output.

variables.name: App Arguments
variables.description: Arguments passed to the binary at runtime.

variables.name: Build Arguments
variables.description: Extra flags passed to cargo build.

variables.name: Pre-Build Command
variables.description: Shell command to run after pulling the repo but before building.
